name: Maintenance Planner
description: Plans and schedules preventive and corrective maintenance work orders for rotating equipment, instrumentation, and electrical systems.

name: Maintenance Technician
description: Executes maintenance orders, records technical findings, and confirms completed work on plant equipment.

name: Maintenance Supervisor
description: Oversees maintenance operations, approves work orders, manages equipment master data and maintenance budgets.

name: Process Engineer
description: Designs and optimizes refinery and chemical processing operations, manages engineering change documentation.

name: Reliability Engineer
description: Focuses on equipment reliability analysis, failure tracking, calibration management and predictive maintenance.

name: GL Accountant
description: Performs journal entries, period-end closing activities, and financial reporting for energy operations.

name: AP Processor
description: Processes vendor invoices, manages payment runs, and maintains vendor records for contractor and supplier payments.

name: Cost Controller
description: Manages cost center accounting, internal orders, project costing, and cost allocation for capital-intensive operations.

name: Treasury Analyst
description: Manages cash positions, bank reconciliations, and financial instruments for commodity trading operations.

name: Procurement Buyer
description: Creates purchase orders for maintenance materials, MRO supplies, and services. Manages requisitions.

name: Strategic Sourcing Manager
description: Manages long-term vendor contracts, commodity purchasing agreements, and sourcing strategy.

name: Warehouse Coordinator
description: Processes goods receipts and issues for spare parts, manages bin locations and inventory in plant warehouses.

name: Inventory Controller
description: Manages physical inventory counts, cycle counting, and inventory valuation for high-value spare parts.

name: HSE Specialist
description: Manages health, safety, and environmental compliance — permits, incident reporting, waste tracking.

name: Quality Inspector
description: Performs quality inspections on incoming materials, records results, and manages material certifications.

name: Production Coordinator
description: Coordinates shift schedules, production orders, and resource allocation across process units.

name: Supply Chain Planner
description: Forecasts demand for chemicals and feedstock, manages safety stock levels and replenishment.

name: IT Systems Administrator
description: Manages SAP system users, roles, transport management, and basis administration.

name: HR Administrator
description: Maintains employee master data, manages organizational structures and personnel actions.

name: Turnaround Planner
description: Plans and coordinates plant turnaround/shutdown activities — scope, materials, contractor management.
